issue_title: Fix some bugs in Chrome Packaged App
issue_body_preview:
This PR fixes bugs that prevented the app from loading correctly as a Chrome Packaged App:

- Remove inline script from `index.html` (forbidden in Chrome Apps)
- Fix loading of initial css (broken by `document.write()` which is also forbidden in Chrome Apps) - this and the above problem prevented
test_description_zh: 在浏览器中打开 jspaint 应用首页，观察应用是否能正常加载，检查页面的 CSS 样式是否正确渲染（包括工具栏、画布区域、菜单栏等 UI 元素的布局和样式），确认页面没有空白或样式缺失的情况。
expected_result_zh: 应用首页能正常加载，所有 CSS 样式正确应用，工具栏、菜单栏、画布区域等 UI 元素正常显示且布局正确，页面无空白或样式缺失现象。
